title: MailerLite vs Constant Contact (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare MailerLite and Constant Contact. See pricing, features, ratings, and which email marketing tool is best for your business.
h1: MailerLite vs Constant Contact: Detailed Comparison
intro: MailerLite and Constant Contact are both popular email marketing platforms, but they serve different audiences and business needs. MailerLite emphasizes affordability and ease of use with a generous free tier, while Constant Contact focuses on comprehensive features for nonprofits and local businesses. This comparison will help you determine which platform is the better fit for your specific requirements.
choose_a_if: You're on a tight budget and want a free plan with up to 1,000 subscribers
You need landing pages, pop-ups, and surveys built into your email tool
You prefer an intuitive drag-and-drop editor and easy automation setup
You prioritize strong customer reviews and ratings
choose_b_if: You need integrated event management and social media advertising tools
SMS marketing capabilities are essential for your campaigns
You're running a nonprofit or local business with specific compliance needs
You want a platform with a longer track record (founded in 1995)

faq.q: Is MailerLite better than Constant Contact?
faq.a: It depends on your needs. MailerLite excels in affordability, user-friendliness, and ecommerce features, earning higher ratings on both G2 (4.6 vs 4.0) and Trustpilot (4.5 vs 2.8). Constant Contact offers more comprehensive features like SMS marketing and event management, making it better suited for nonprofits and larger local businesses.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, MailerLite or Constant Contact?
faq.a: MailerLite is significantly cheaper overall. It offers a free tier for up to 1,000 subscribers, while Constant Contact has no free option and starts at $12/month. MailerLite's paid plans begin at just $9/month, giving it a clear pricing advantage for budget-conscious users.

faq.q: Can I switch from Constant Contact to MailerLite?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support email list exports and imports. Most users can migrate their contact lists and campaign templates relatively easily. MailerLite's intuitive interface and comprehensive onboarding support make the transition straightforward for users switching from Constant Contact.
